Earth Processes · Week 2

Plate Tectonics, Earthquakes & Volcanoes

Peru sits on one of the most seismically active zones on the planet.

This page will cover the Nazca Plate subduction under the South American Plate, Peru's earthquake history, and its volcanic arc.
